---
title: "LNCCForce"
generated: true
description: "Analytic local-cross-correlation force (the greedy-SyN default)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._force`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LNCCForce -->
```python
class LNCCForce
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LNCCForce -->
Analytic local-cross-correlation force (the greedy-SyN default).

The closed-form $\text{lncc\_grad}(\text{warped}, \text{fixed}) \cdot
\nabla\,\text{warped}$ (via `metrics.lncc_grad`) -- ascends the
windowed cross-correlation; robust to smooth intensity inhomogeneity.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LNCCForce.bind -->
```python
bind(fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, ndim: int, rel_spacing: RelSpacing = None) -> _BoundLNCC
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Bind to `fixed`, carrying the window radius and backend settings.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LNCCForce.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(radius: int = 2, derivative: Literal['exact', 'center'] = 'exact', backend: Backend = 'jax') -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:LNCCForce -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
